name: Suspicious PowerShell Download Cradle
description: Detects PowerShell download cradles using Net.WebClient or IEX
raw_query: process where process.command_line like~ "*Net.WebClient*" and process.command_line like~ "*DownloadString*"
translated_query: process where process.command_line like~ "*Net.WebClient*" and process.command_line like~ "*DownloadString*"
